segments.speaker: Barista
segments.text: Hi, what can I get started for you?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Could I get an iced latte, medium, please?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Whole milk is fine. Actually, do you have oat milk?

segments.speaker: Barista
segments.text: We do. It's a dollar extra.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That's fine. I'll do oat milk then.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: For here, please. I'm going to sit and do some work.

segments.speaker: Barista
segments.text: Got it. You can tap whenever you're ready.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Could I get the receipt too?
